blended.narrative: Hoodoo is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,079 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 9 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 28°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 6".
